evidence.title: Answer to the letter to the editor of E. Mohebi, et al. concerning "The safety and accuracy of radiation-free spinal navigation using a short, scoliosis-specific BoneMRI-protocol, compared to CT" by P.P.G. Lafranca, et al. (Eur spine J [2025]; doi:10.1007/s00586-025-09151-x).
evidence.journal: European spine journal : official publication of the European Spine Society, the European Spinal Deformity Society, and the European Section of the Cervical Spine Research Society
